## What and why

One or two sentences: what this changes and why.

## Type

- [ ] Doc fix or clarification
- [ ] Platform rule update (source linked below)
- [ ] New template, checklist, or archetype
- [ ] Scaffold script change

## Checklist

- [ ] No fake proof (invented stars, downloads, benchmarks, or quotes).
- [ ] No credentials committed.
- [ ] Platform-rule claims cite an official or best available source.
- [ ] Cross-reference links resolve.
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`).
